name: European Lithium Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.4246. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.4245 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.4246, stop A$0.3713, target A$0.4400. Risk/reward is 0.29:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
